title: Top 8 The Emo Drag Musical
description: Top 8 - The Emo Drag Musical - a solo y2k nostalgia trip Are you ready to go back to 2005? Join Luspinda for her first solo comedy show in an emo musical journey back to the early 00s. Help her decide what we should bring back into 2026 to make the world a better place and what should remain firmly in the depths of the noughties. Expect pop-punk, MSN, MySpace, studded belts and even a few hula hoops (she is a world record breaker after all). Capture it all on your Sony Cybershot camera. RaWr <3 xoxo
